name: Easywell Biomedicals, Inc.
summary: Easywell Biomedicals, Inc., a biopharmaceutical and medical device company, develops and commercializes medical devices, drug substances, and pharmaceutical dosage forms in Taiwan and internationally. The company offers pharmaceutical products, which include high-barrier generics for the treatment of anti-cough, anti-urinary incontinence, breast cancer in PMS women, anti-depression, prevention of pneumocystis pneumonia, epilepsy, chronic angina, and inflammatory lesions of rosacea; and 505(b)(2) drugs for the treatment of Parkinson's, urinary, and pneumonia diseases. It also provides medical devices, including digital clinical, infrared ear, and non-contact forehead infrared thermometers. The company was formerly known as Actherm Inc. and changed its name to Easywell Biomedicals, Inc. in July 2015. Easywell Biomedicals, Inc. was incorporated in 1998 and is headquartered in Hsinchu City, Taiwan.
